static_faqs.question: When does the product launch?
static_faqs.answer: Our Voice AI platform officially launches on September 1, 2026. Early-access customers on the Enterprise plan get access starting August 15, 2026.

static_faqs.question: How much does it cost?
static_faqs.answer: We offer three plans: Starter at $49/month, Pro at $199/month, and Enterprise with custom pricing. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

static_faqs.question: What are your support hours?
static_faqs.answer: Live support is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM (CET). This AI assistant is available 24/7.

static_faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
static_faqs.answer: We offer a full refund within 30 days of purchase, no questions asked. Refunds are processed back to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

documents.title: Resetting your password
documents.text: To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot password'. Enter your account email and we'll send a secure reset link that is valid for 30 minutes. If it doesn't arrive, check your spam folder or contact support.

documents.title: Integrating with the REST API
documents.text: Authenticate every API request with a Bearer token from Settings > API Keys. The base URL is https://api.example.com/v1. Endpoints are rate-limited to 100 requests per minute on the Pro plan and 1000 on Enterprise.

documents.title: Reducing Voice AI latency
documents.text: For low-latency voice calls, enable streaming responses and deploy in the region closest to your callers. Typical end-to-end latency is under 800ms when streaming is enabled and the model is warm.

documents.title: Managing billing and invoices
documents.text: You can view and download invoices under Settings > Billing. To upgrade or downgrade your plan, use the 'Change plan' button; changes are prorated and applied immediately. Update your payment method anytime under Billing > Payment.

documents.title: Data privacy and GDPR
documents.text: We are GDPR compliant. You can export all of your account data from Settings > Privacy > Export, or request account deletion which permanently removes your data within 30 days. Call recordings are encrypted at rest with AES-256.

documents.title: Configuring webhooks
documents.text: Webhooks let you receive real-time events. Add an endpoint under Settings > Webhooks and select the events to subscribe to. Each delivery is signed with an HMAC-SHA256 signature so you can verify authenticity; retries happen for up to 24 hours on failure.
